nasb.text: Of Him all the prophets bear witness that through His name everyone who believes in Him receives forgiveness of sins.”

esv.text: To him all the prophets bear witness that everyone who believes in him receives forgiveness of sins through his name.”

cnv.text: 所有先知都為他作見證：所有信他的，都必藉著他的名，罪得赦免。”

ccb.text: 所有先知也都为祂做见证说，‘谁信祂，谁的罪就能借着祂的名得到赦免。’”

csbs.text: 所有的先知都为耶稣见证：‘所有信他的人，都将藉着他的名，罪得赦免。’”
